values.name: picture
values.comment: Create a `picture` tag. The attributes will be placed on the inner `img` tag.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { sources : List.List (Html.Source.Source kind), src : String.String, alt : Maybe.Maybe String.String } -> Html.Html msg

name: Html.Source

unions.name: Single
unions.comment: A source comprised of a single image.

unions.name: Source
unions.comment: A source set of images, used to build a `source` tag.

values.name: fromImagesAndDensities
values.comment: Build a `Source` from a set of images with given densities.
values.type: List.List { url : String.String, density : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int } -> Html.Source.Source Html.Source.WithDensities

values.name: fromImagesAndWidths
values.comment: Build a `Source` from a set of images with given widths.
values.type: List.List { url : String.String, width : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int } -> Html.Source.Source Html.Source.WithWidths

values.name: single
values.comment: Build a `Source` from a single image.

values.name: toHtml
values.comment: Convert a `Source` to the corresponding html tag.

values.name: withSizes
values.comment: Set the `size` attribute. The second argument is the (optional) default size.
values.type: List.List ( Css.Media.Expression, Css.Value.Value Css.Length ) -> Maybe.Maybe (Css.Value.Value Css.Length) -> Html.Source.Source Html.Source.WithWidths -> Html.Source.Source Html.Source.WithWidths
